---
title: "Locality Transformations for Nested Recursive Iteration Spaces"
date: 2017-04-04
year: 2017
pdf: "https://dl.acm.org/doi/pdf/10.1145/3093337.3037720"
venue: "ASPLOS 2017"
award: ""
code: "https://github.com/kirshanthans/twisted-interchanger"
slides: "files/slides/asplos2017.pptx"
preprint: ""
video: ""
author:
  - name: Kirshanthan Sundararajah
  - name: Laith Sakka
  - name: Milind Kulkarni
categories:
  - Conference
description: ""
---
